revision_note: v1.1 corrects v1.0: the QP-form CLARABEL profile is ADMISSIBLE (valid primal+dual under the common certifier; fully qualifies 4/5 F_Q). It is eliminated on the PRIMARY criterion (U=1), not at admissibility. v1.0 wrongly conflated it with the retired exact-conic experiment (commit 18c55f5). Owner ruling.

F_Q.solver: QUADPROG_SQRT (the primary; not a fallback candidate)

eligibility_filter: algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary
valid primal AND dual mappings under the common certifier
judged by the identical external certifier

candidate_table.exclusion_reason: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary QUADPROG_SQRT
not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary QUADPROG_SQRT
not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary QUADPROG_SQRT

excluded_before_ranking.QUADPROG_RAW: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary QUADPROG_SQRT
excluded_before_ranking.QUADPROG_TSCALED: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary QUADPROG_SQRT
excluded_before_ranking.HIGHS_QPASM: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary QUADPROG_SQRT

selection_result.winner_basis: among admissible profiles that rescue all 5 F_Q (U=0): PIQP_P2 (51) < PIQP_P1 (59) on standalone tie-break. CLARABEL (standalone 29) does NOT enter the tie-break because it fails the primary criterion (U=1).

clarabel_qp_profile.row_2765: numerical certificate nonqualification (kkt_residual+stationarity_residual) — NOT an integrity or dual-mapping defect

clarabel_exact_conic_experiment.reason: invalid dual transformation in the abandoned conic reformulation (the conic dual cannot survive 1/sqrt(t)); a DIFFERENT implementation from the QP-form profile above
clarabel_exact_conic_experiment.note: MR002_QP_CandidateCapabilityManifest_ClarabelRemediation.json is historical evidence about a Clarabel dependency/API field (static_regularization_eps) — it is NOT exclusion evidence against the admissible QP-form profile.

per_row_feasibility.predicate: complete registered KKT + two-sided signed-gap; full-qualifier = QUALIFIES under it (requires valid dual)
per_row_feasibility.statement: Each of the five QUADPROG_SQRT nonqualification instances is fully qualified by multiple independent solver implementations, establishing that all five registered problems are feasible and the QUADPROG_SQRT outcomes are numerical false-infeasibilities.
